channel.title: SevenAtSevenLastSection
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenLastSection, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Having a Baby? 5 Tips to Avoid Problems From Flawed Drug Testing at the Hospital
item.description: Hospitals routinely use unreliable drug tests at childbirth, and many parents are reported to child welfare agencies and the police. Hereâs what you c...

item.title: Iowaâs Top Court Ended Court Fees in Dismissed Cases. Politicians Want Them Back
item.description: The state can no longer saddle defendants with court fees when charges are dismissed. Prosecutors are backing legislation to restore them.
